title: Red Cross Book Translations
wikitext:
[]: Red Cross Book Translations             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Fri Jul 16, 2004 2:13 am here is a link to a page that contains the translations of the RBC! http://anime.duckmaker.com/eva/book.txt

[]:             Quote Post by Super Mega Ultra Deluxe » Fri Jul 16, 2004 2:23 am Well, evaotaku.com as we know also has the RCB translations, I would recommend there instead, since it's also easier to navigate and read

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Fri Jul 16, 2004 2:27 am Blah, skullbag beat me to saying that. There's a few good translations of the RCB out there.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Fri Jul 16, 2004 2:27 am really? ...oh, well i planned on C&Ping it into word, then reading it/ printing it

[]:             Quote Post by Abaddon » Fri Jul 16, 2004 11:23 am for that matter, has anyone here ever seen a copy of RCB?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jul 16, 2004 1:27 pm God damnit. I hate it when people repost translations and guides without their copy policies. There are two major translations of the End of Evangelion program guide, aka Red Cross Book, or RCB for short. One is translated by Patrick Yip, the other is translated by Bochan_Bird of EvaOtaku. Patrick Yip's translation can be found (in full) here: http://www.evamonkey.com/glossaries_rcb0.htm Bochan_Bird's translation can be found here: http://www.evaotaku.com/html/rcb.html And I'm changing this topic's title, for the fact that it is horribly innappropriate.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sat Jul 17, 2004 8:32 pm go fuck yourself! thats inappropiriate.
